parsed_review.summary: CP00-255 is a clean descriptor-only increment covering the RP07.P05.M06 Synthetic Fixture Set middle rows (S09-S18, risk A, 10 units). Independent read-only verification confirms full consistency across the live plan (closeout-pack-plan.json:412), manifest, contract (search-core-contract.json:16), and registry binding (registry.js:361): CP00-255, risk A, 10 units, range RP07.P05.M06.S09-RP07.P05.M06.S18, next CP00-256/S19, source_ledger_sha matching. Deliverable distribution (impl 3, security_audit 2, fixture 1, test 3, hermes 1 = 10) matches the prompt and requirements (registry.js:1864). The descriptor builder (service.js:2774) and case-set produce only frozen plain objects with every no-write/no-runtime flag false (no search/OCR/index/embedding/AI runtime, no state writes, no object storage, no Hermes runtime receipt) and synthetic_only/no_real_data true. The validator (validators.js:4097-4157) deterministically enforces coverage, per-row descriptor_only/runtime_execution=false/customer_safe/no-raw-payload, M06 no-leak guards (cross-tenant denied, unauthorized data omitted, no AI dispatch, no test-runtime, no Hermes receipt, no Claude final approval, no audit-hint leak), and authority-boundary projections; all asserted row-extras exist with correct values (service.js:2365-2374). Authority boundary is intact: Claude remains a read-only reviewer (tools Read/Grep/Glob, read_only true) and is not final approver; claude_is_final_approval/local_validation_claims_enterprise_trust are false; human approval is required before runtime opening. Hermes patterns are used only for the deterministic H07 evidence-packet descriptor (receipt_shape descriptor_only..no_write), not product runtime. The pack correctly holds production_ready=false / implemented_pending_review and exposes only a production_ready_candidate, so the gate is not prematurely flipped. Review-hardening preconditions pass: auth preflight succeeded with valid JSON, prompt 2166B under the 25600B cap, no forbidden tools, summary-only correctly disallowed. Tests (model.test.js:1309-1355) and validator script (validate-rp07-search-core-contract.mjs:471-1028) genuinely exercise the CP255 logic with deep-equal contract projection checks; index.js re-exports via export *; command-evidence shows all gates at exit 0. The post-review evidence files (claude-review-result.json, adjudication.md, construction-inspection.json) are absent, which is the expected state at this read_only_claude_run_raw_capture step rather than a defect. No P0/P1/P2/P3 findings.
